name: Many Spice Chicken Stir-Fry
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, stir together 2 tablespoons of oil, sherry, and all the spices. Set aside.
2. Place the stir fry pan over high heat and add 1 tablespoon of oil.
3. Stir fry onion and peppers until soft. Remove vegetables from the pan.
4. Add remaining oil, then chicken, and stir fry until no longer pink (about 3 minutes).
5. When the chicken is done, add spice mixture and tomatoes, and stir constantly until the mixture boils and thickens (about 1 minute).
6. Add vegetables back into the pan and stir fry for 1 or 2 minutes or until vegetables are heated through.
7. Makes two servings.
